channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Veterinary College in Tirunelveli Successfully Treats Injured Six-Foot Python
item.description: In a remarkable case, veterinarians at the Veterinary College and Research Institute (VCRI) in Tirunelveli successfully performed surgery on a four-year-old python that was severely injured after bein...

item.title: Sustainable Food Systems: A Key Factor in Future Civilizational Progress
item.description: A new article explores the critical role of sustainable food systems in the 21st century, positing that the ability to organize these systems could define the progress of civilizations. The article hi...

item.title: Judge Thumba Pillay celebrates 90 years of legal activism and service
item.description: Renowned anti-apartheid activist and retired judge Barathanathan “Thumba” Pillay celebrated his 90th birthday on 4 April 2026 in Clairwood, Durban, surrounded by family, friends, and colleagues from a...

item.title: Commission Explains Reasons for Extending Inquiry Deadline
item.description: The Chairperson of the Commission of Inquiry into the October 29, 2025 incidents, retired Chief Justice Othman, has explained that the recent 21-day extension of the Commission’s mandate was based on ...

item.title: Israel's Strikes on Lebanon Raise Questions Over Ceasefire Timing

item.title: Systemic Failures and State-Controlled Child Evacuations in Ukraine
item.description: Recent investigations have revealed that Ukrainian authorities, under a 2026 law, have the legal power to remove children from conflict zones without parental consent, exacerbating risks of abuse, neg...

item.title: 175 Kenyan Health Facilities Equipped to Improve Maternal and Newborn Care
item.description: Kenya has taken a major step in improving maternal and newborn health by equipping 175 health facilities across 31 counties with critical medical equipment. The supplies, distributed between March 18 ...

item.title: Artemis II Mission: Astronauts Observe Unexpected Events and Reveal Stunning Lunar Views

item.title: Alexandra residents give input on the type of police they want in their community
item.description: Residents of Alexandra, Johannesburg, have been given the opportunity to voice their opinions on the type of police officers they want serving their area. This initiative, led by the South African Pol...

item.title: Assam HSLC 2026 Result to Be Declared on 10th April; Students Can Check Official Websites
item.description: The Assam HSLC (High School Leaving Certificate) results for the year 2026 are expected to be officially declared on 10th April. Students who appeared for the examination can check their results throu...

item.title: Zanzibar President Recognises Law Society’s Role and Supports Legal and Investment Initiatives

item.title: Chezka Carandang and Katrice Kierulf share their relationship publicly through an Instagram video
item.description: On April 9, 2026, celebrity couple Chezka Carandang and Katrice Kierulf officially announced their romantic relationship on social media. The couple shared a heartwarming Instagram video, marking thei...

item.title: BINI Announces New EP 'Signals' and Performs 'Blush' at Coachella
item.description: Filipino girl group BINI has released their latest extended play (EP) titled 'Signals,' marking a new milestone in their music career. The group is set to showcase their lead track 'Blush' at the worl...

item.title: Simeone Praises Barcelona, PSG, and Bayern After Atletico Madrid Shock Camp Nou Win

item.title: Greek Police Probe Yacht Allegedly Linked To Businessman Nidal Karameh In Drug Seizure Case
item.description: Reports don dey circulate say Greek police don raid one luxury yacht called “Hallo” wey dem talk say get connection to Lebanese-Nigerian businessman Nidal Mofid Karameh. Di raid happen for di island o...

item.title: Phoenix Crime and Community Assist reaches 10-year milestone and expands community support
item.description: Phoenix Crime and Community Assist (PCCA), a non-profit organisation based in Durban, celebrated its 10th anniversary in March 2026. Founded in 2016, the organisation began as a free online platform p...

item.title: PDP Leaders Hold Solidarity Meeting With ADC to Strengthen Opposition Unity
item.description: Tanimu Turaki, the factional chairman of the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), don yarn leadership matter as e lead some PDP leaders go meet the African Democratic Congress (ADC) wey David Mark dey lead...

item.title: Kano College Land Dispute: Court Restrains Construction, Orders Status Quo
item.description: Things dey hot for Kano! A High Court don put a stop to that N36 billion building project for Federal Government College (FGC) Kano. The court, presided over by a judge, say make dem no continue with ...

item.title: Close Contest: [Team A] Edges Out [Team B] in Thrilling Finish
